prompt: A dramatic vertical anime key visual poster for an original TV series titled ナイトコード：リベラシオン, with the English subtitle "Nightcode: Liberation" placed directly beneath the large Japanese logo at the top center. The composition shows 2 main characters standing back to back in a neon cyber city at night. On the left is a slim teenage boy in side profile facing left, with messy black hair, pale skin, sharp violet eyes, and a serious expression, wearing a dark high-collar school-uniform-style jacket. On the right foreground is a slim teenage girl shown from the chest up, facing slightly right but turning away from the boy; her face is obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur block, but her body and hair are fully visible. She has extremely long split-color hair, half pastel pink and half dark charcoal gray, styled in loose flowing lengths with a side ponytail on the dark side, and she wears a white sailor school blouse with navy trim, oversized sleeves, a large hot-pink ribbon bow, and a dark pleated skirt. The background is a dense futuristic nighttime skyline with glowing windows, magenta and cyan city lights, haze, lens flares, bokeh, and subtle star-like particles, creating a moody urban fantasy atmosphere. Use a high-contrast palette of black, indigo, violet, cyan, and neon pink, with halftone dot textures in the upper-right and lower-left corners. Add stylized Japanese promotional copy throughout the poster: a short tagline in small text along the top, a vertical slogan on the right side, a circular badge on the left reading 今夏 7月 放送開始!, a left column of staff credits in small Japanese text, a lower-left cast block, a bold large tagline across the bottom reading 二重人格×魔法×青春＝偽りの救世主、開幕。, and small official website and social handle text near the lower right. The logo should be luminous, elegant, and slightly fractured, with a supernatural cyber-magic feel. Render in polished modern anime poster style, cinematic lighting, crisp line art, glossy shading, premium promotional visual design, highly detailed hair and fabric folds, with the central mood of dual identity, magic, adolescence, and a false savior emerging in the neon night.
